station_troy.name: Troy Station
station_troy.description: A bustling merchant hub at the system's core.

station_blackrock.name: Blackrock Outpost
station_blackrock.description: A rough outpost on the system's edge. Ask no questions.

station_kepler.name: Fort Kepler
station_kepler.description: Militia headquarters in the Vega system. Keep your papers in order.

asteroid_field.name: Kepler Belt
asteroid_field.description: Dense asteroid field. Rich salvage — high risk.

nav_point_echo.name: Nav Point Echo
nav_point_echo.description: A derelict navigation beacon. Dead silent.
